SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2019 BY DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF DIANA GREERIS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM YEE, PROPERTY SUPERVISOR AND JUANA THOMAS, PROPERTY MANAGER ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREER, DIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
